Title: 📂 levels Commands
Description: List of commands under the levels category — track XP, check ranks, and manage the levelling system.

fields.Title: ranklist
fields.Value: Display every rank title and the level at which it unlocks.

fields.Title: level
fields.Value: Show your current level, XP, and progress toward the next level.

fields.Title: add_rank (/)
fields.Value: Assign a rank title to a specific level (staff/owner only).

fields.Title: remove_rank (/)
fields.Value: Remove a rank title from a specific level (staff/owner only).

fields.Title: set_xp (/)
fields.Value: Set a user's XP to a specific value (staff/owner only).

fields.Title: set_level (/)
fields.Value: Set a user's level directly (staff/owner only).

fields.Title: user_level (/)
fields.Value: Check the level & XP progress of a specific user (staff/owner only).
